sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2239" key="ai)desto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰδ-εστός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n2239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">revered, venerable</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.67b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
